creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 236637
ibus alone removed, installed

(In reply to Henry Hu from comment #8)

> … do you have the DCONF option enabled for the port? …

Sorry, I should have mentioned earlier, the installation was from the FreeBSD repository, so (yes) it was enabled: 

<https://www.freshports.org/textproc/ibus/#config>


> … I think the easiest way to fix it is by uninstalling and re-installing …

True. I did so (transcript attached), then logged out from Plasma and 

reboot -r


(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #7)

> * I recently lost the 
>   ability to use Control-Shift-U for Unicode input in various applications 
>   (the key combination is no longer effective).

Fixed!

Thank you. I'll close this bug report. 

With me alone reporting, shall we close as not a bug?
